content: Ni ICU, nigba ti a n ṣe ilana iṣọkan idakẹjẹ meji-ọna lati propofol si dexmedetomidine, igbohunsafẹfẹ asopọ-ipele akọkọ (primary infusion rate) ti dexmedetomidine maa n ṣe iṣiro da lori iwọn lilo propofol lọwọlọwọ ati ipo alaisan. Awọn itọnisọna gbogbogbo ni lati bẹrẹ dexmedetomidine ni iwọn kekere, nigbagbogbo ni 0.2-0.7 mcg/kg/ wakati, ki o si dinku propofol ni igbesẹ, lati yago fun idapọ sedation ti o pọ ju tabi withdrawal. Awọn iṣiro pato le yatọ da lori ilana ICU ati ipo alaisan, ṣugbọn iṣiro naa da lori iwọn lilo propofol lọwọlọwọ ati ifarada alaisan si dexmedetomidine.
